name: ClockProgress
description: A circular clock-style progress indicator that fills like a clock hand sweeping from 12 o'clock position.
usage_guidelines: Use for time-based progress or completion percentages.
Set value between 0-100 to indicate progress.
Useful for timers, countdowns, or completion indicators.

size.description: Diameter of the clock circle in pixels.

styling_info.visual_description: A circular indicator with a pie-slice fill that sweeps clockwise from the top. Background is light gray, filled portion is darker gray. Has a subtle border.

Dont: Don't make size too small (hard to see)

Basic.title: Basic
